_comment: Реестр ниш yt-factory (EN-only, US-аудитория). Стратегия: 1 длинный докуканал (монетизация long-form 10-12 мин) + Shorts-канал того же бренда (тот же диктор kokoro am_michael) как воронка на длинные видео. category = YouTube categoryId (27 = Education). format переключается core.set_format(niche['format']) перед сборкой.

niches.title: History Documentaries — Empires, Fortunes & Engineering
niches.topic_brief: Cinematic history documentaries with a wealth, business, and engineering angle: how business empires rose and collapsed, fortunes made and lost, great engineering feats, and the everyday economic life of past eras. Every video is a researched story with specific numbers, names, and dates — precise, curiosity-driven, and briskly paced. This is NOT sleep content: no droning, no padding, every minute earns the next.
niches.tone: cinematic documentary narrator — confident, precise, curious; builds stakes like a storyteller, lands facts like a historian
niches.broll_hint: archival footage, old factory, vintage city street, steam engine, historical map, gold coins, old stock exchange, construction of bridge, sepia photographs, oil derricks, sailing ships, candlelit ledger
niches.cta: Subscribe — one forgotten fortune, empire, or machine every week.

niches.title: History Shorts — One Fact That Hooks
niches.topic_brief: Single-fact vertical hooks from the same history family as the long documentaries: business empires, fortunes made and lost, engineering feats, everyday economics of past eras. One video = one jaw-dropping verified fact with a sharp hook in the first second, teasing the deeper long-form story on the channel. Same narrator voice as the documentaries — one brand.
niches.tone: punchy, confident, hook-first; the same documentary narrator in sprint mode
niches.broll_hint: archival footage, gold coins, old factory, vintage newspaper headline, steam engine, historical map, sepia crowd, old bank vault
niches.cta: The full story is on the channel — subscribe.
